caption: The video features a close-up of a tiger, with its face prominently displayed and its mouth slightly open, revealing its teeth. The background is blurred, drawing attention to the tiger's striking features. Overlaid on the image are bold text elements. Initially, the text reads "$1/YEAR NO ADDED COST," suggesting an offer or promotion related to the tiger, possibly for adoption or conservation efforts. As the video progresses, the text changes to "$1/YEAR AVAILABLE TO," indicating that the offer is being extended to a specific group or audience. The consistent presence of the tiger throughout the frames emphasizes the importance of the animal in the context of the message being conveyed.
